protocols.title: HeLa cell cryopreservation with DMSO and trehalose additives
protocols.description: Freezing and thawing HeLa cells with DMSO-containing medium and optional trehalose or sucrose cryoprotectant additives, followed by post-thaw viability measurement.
steps_preview: Prepare HeLa cells in logarithmic growth phase.
Suspend cells in freezing medium containing DMSO and candidate sugar additive.
Freeze at controlled rate and evaluate post-thaw viability after recovery.

protocols.title: Mammalian cell freezing and thawing viability assay
protocols.description: Standard mammalian cell cryopreservation workflow using DMSO and a post-thaw cell viability assay.
steps_preview: Combine cell suspension with chilled cryopreservation medium.
Transfer vials to controlled-rate freezing container.
Thaw rapidly and assess viability.

protocols.title: Paper-based electrochemical CRP immunosensor protocol
protocols.description: Fabrication of a paper-based electrochemical biosensor functionalized with anti-CRP antibodies to detect C-reactive protein in whole blood or plasma.
steps_preview: Print carbon working electrodes on wax-patterned paper.
Functionalize the electrode with anti-CRP capture antibodies.
Apply diluted whole blood sample and read the electrochemical signal within 10 minutes.

protocols.title: Rapid C-reactive protein detection from blood samples
protocols.description: Rapid immunoassay workflow for C-reactive protein in whole blood and serum samples.
steps_preview: Prepare anti-CRP antibody conjugates.
Add blood sample to the test strip.
Record signal intensity against CRP calibrators.

protocols.title: Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG supplementation and intestinal permeability in C57BL/6 mice
protocols.description: Four-week oral Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG supplementation in C57BL/6 mice followed by FITC-dextran intestinal permeability measurement against untreated controls.
steps_preview: Randomize C57BL/6 mice into control and LGG supplementation groups.
Administer Lactobacillus rhamnosus GG by oral gavage for 4 weeks.
Quantify intestinal permeability using plasma FITC-dextran fluorescence.

protocols.title: FITC-dextran intestinal permeability assay in mice
protocols.description: Mouse gut barrier assay for measuring intestinal permeability by oral FITC-dextran administration and plasma fluorescence.
steps_preview: Fast mice before FITC-dextran administration.
Administer FITC-dextran by oral gavage.
Collect blood and measure fluorescence.

protocols.title: Cell viability measurement using luminescent reagent
protocols.description: Generic endpoint assay for quantifying cell viability after treatment or recovery.
steps_preview: Seed cells in a white-walled plate.
Add luminescent viability reagent.
Read luminescence after incubation.

protocols.title: Antibody functionalization of carbon electrodes
protocols.description: Surface chemistry workflow for immobilizing antibodies on carbon electrodes for electrochemical immunoassays.
steps_preview: Clean carbon electrode surface.
Activate surface groups for antibody attachment.
Block non-specific binding sites before sample exposure.

protocols.title: Daily probiotic gavage in laboratory mice
protocols.description: Administration of probiotic bacteria to mice by oral gavage with vehicle control handling.
steps_preview: Prepare fresh probiotic suspension.
Dose mice by oral gavage at the scheduled time.
Record body weight and adverse events.

protocols.title: Whole blood sample preparation for rapid biosensor assays
protocols.description: Minimal whole blood sample handling before rapid electrochemical or optical biosensor readouts.
steps_preview: Collect anticoagulated whole blood.
Dilute sample in assay buffer if required.
Apply sample to the biosensor within the validated time window.

protocols.title: Standard DMSO cell banking protocol for adherent cell lines
protocols.description: Reference cell banking protocol for adherent cell lines using DMSO-containing cryopreservation medium.
steps_preview: Harvest adherent cells at healthy confluence.
Resuspend cells in standard DMSO freezing medium.
Freeze vials and transfer to long-term storage.

protocols.title: Sandwich immunoassay setup for inflammatory biomarkers
protocols.description: Generic capture and detection antibody workflow for soluble inflammatory biomarkers including CRP.
steps_preview: Coat surface with capture antibody.
Add standard or biological sample.
Read bound detection antibody signal.
